examples: The sociobiology view has been attacked on numerous grounds.
An offshoot of the biological approach called sociobiology suggests that aggression is natural and even desirable for people.
Edward o Wilson is one of the architects of that bleak philosophy called sociobiology.
Dr Anderson's research has been published in the journal Behavioral Ecology and Sociobiology.
Horrified, because of its implications for human nature which still make sociobiology a controversial discipline.
